text:
Three rejections on a valid NY license over two weeks is frustrating, especially with funds sitting untraded. Common culprits are glare on the photo or a corner of the ID getting cut off in the frame — worth checking before you resubmit.

I'm not able to see the specific rejection reason from here, so I'm routing this to our KYC ops team to review your submissions directly and tell you exactly what's tripping the check.

Novig Support
